_comment: Project-scoped CC settings for the Stock Research Assistant. SessionStart hook nudges the user when no morning brief exists for today (ET-aware). Schema uses real CC hook shape (matcher + hooks array + type:command + $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) — verified against ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/omc/hooks/hooks.json. NOT VS Code's ${workspaceFolder} variable (Critic iter2 BLOCKER 2 caught a fictional schema in the iter2 draft; this is the canonical replacement).
